description: Product description The scent of innocence. A burst of deep, tart blackberry juice, blending with the freshness of just-gathered bay and brambly woods. Vibrant and verdant Directions Spray on the pulse points, avoid eyes and mouth. 1-2 sprays for a 30 ml bottle.
